commands.review_summary:
The PR removes the `/mcp` docs redirect and adds a regression assertion that the CLI docs search MCP server path is not also a docs redirect source.

PR surface: Tests +21, Docs -4. Total +17 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current source points `openclaw docs` at `https://docs.openclaw.ai/mcp.search_open_claw`, current docs config redirects `/mcp`, and a live request on May 25, 2026 returned HTML for `/mcp` even with `Accept: text/event-stream`.
commands.review_followup: No automated code repair is needed; the remaining merge gate is contributor or maintainer proof of the deployed route plus an explicit acceptance of the public `/mcp` redirect tradeoff.

target.title: [codex] Fix docs MCP search route
target.body:
## Summary

- Remove the `/mcp` docs redirect so it no longer shadows the docs MCP search server path used by `openclaw docs`.
- Add a regression check that keeps the CLI docs search selector aligned with `docs/docs.json` redirects.

Fixes #86223.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/docs.test.ts`
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs docs/docs.json`
- `node scripts/docs-link-audit.mjs`
- `pnpm format:check src/commands/docs.test.ts docs/docs.json`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `openclaw docs` calls `https://docs.openclaw.ai/mcp.search_open_claw`, which resolves the MCP server URL to `/mcp`; the docs redirect for `/mcp` made that path return HTML instead of the expected SSE endpoint.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on the issue branch, rebased on latest `origin/main`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran the verification commands listed above after rebasing and before opening this draft PR.

Evidence after fix: The docs command regression test passes and now asserts that the MCP server path derived from the fixed tool selector is not present as a docs redirect source. The docs MDX check, docs link audit, formatting check, diff whitespace check, and structured autoreview all passed.

Observed result after fix: `docs/docs.json` no longer publishes a `/mcp` redirect, while `src/commands/docs.test.ts` keeps `https://docs.openclaw.ai/mcp.search_open_claw` as the expected lowercase tool selector.

What was not tested: The live production `https://docs.openclaw.ai/mcp` response after docs publish/staging deploy; this PR only updates the source configuration and regression coverage.
